name: lovable-supabase-rls-rescue
description: A synthetic, reproducible Supabase-style RLS tenant-isolation failure for launch-rescue evidence.

scripts.check: node --check src/baseline-database.js && node --check src/rescued-database.js && node --check test/broken-baseline.test.js && node --check test/rescued-tenant-isolation.test.js && node --check scripts/check-project.js && node scripts/check-project.js
